title: RBI Amends LAB Capital Adequacy Norms Because Forex Risk Rules Must Align with International Standards
description:
The RBI has introduced a revised methodology for calculating foreign exchange risk capital for Local Area Banks. The amendment aligns prudential norms with international standards and becomes effective from April 1, 2027.
The post RBI Amends LAB Capital Adequacy Norms Because Forex Risk Rules Must Align with International Standards appeared first on TaxGuru.
